since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.61%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.09% · BTC -2.13% · Gold -2.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.56%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.61%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.61%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.36%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +5.95%, SKHY +5.77%, AVAV +5.75%, HON +5.27%, MU +5.10%. Laggards: TSLA -13.36%, CRNC -9.00%, GOOGL -6.52%, UPST -4.54%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.43% at $115.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
